prompt: Make a mobile 3D chase-camera racing game where I drive a golden sports car down a foggy highway. It needs gas, brake, drift, speed HUD, distance progress, traffic, and checkpoints.

Build a turn-based tank duel on hilly terrain. Player and enemy take turns. I choose angle and power, pick weapon cards like hail stone or wrecking ball, then fire a projectile arc affected by gravity.
Create a level puzzle called Tight Squeeze where a stick figure stretches a bendy arm or rope through narrow gaps around blocks to grab a diamond without touching obstacles.
Make an isometric blocky survival camp game. Three survivors stand near a campfire, day 1 starts, health hunger and fire meters drain, I use an axe from the hotbar to chop trees and gather resources.
Build a cozy painting studio creator game. I draw on a canvas with brushes and colors, unlock more palettes and frame styles, clear or sell the painting for coins, and use shop buttons.
Create a nail salon decorating tool with a large hand, nail surface, color sliders, patterns, finishes, decor tabs, locked cosmetics, undo redo mirror new and save controls.
Make a polished bubble shooter with a staggered grid of glossy colored bubbles, score and best HUD, next bubble preview, launcher at the bottom, and a dotted bounce aim trajectory.
Make a cute glamour image slice puzzle where the player slides or reveals split panels of a portrait image, sees 1/2 progress, completes the picture, then taps next puzzle.
